_description: EEG Pipeline Parameters - Adjust these without editing scripts

exclude_channels_analysis._doc: Channels excluded from ROI-based analyses. EMG (F7/FT7, F8/FT8, TP7/TP8) are typed as emg. AF7/AF8 are scalp EEG (not EOG). M1/M2/BVEOG/TVEOG are typed as misc. This list covers frontopolar channels that remain on the scalp but carry residual ocular contamination.

erp_branch._doc: Dedicated low-cut ERP branch for conservative P3b estimation only. It does not feed ASR, ICA, PAC, or alpha-gamma PAC outputs.

asr._doc_cutoff: SD threshold for burst rejection. Higher = more conservative (less aggressive). Default in EEGLAB is 20; 30 is more conservative, preserving more original signal and only cleaning extreme bursts.
asr._doc_clean_windows: When true, ASR uses clean_windows to automatically select the cleanest calibration segments from the entire block (standard practice). When false, uses first 60s (legacy).
asr._doc_reshape_retry: Workaround for a rare asrpy block_covariance boundary-condition bug where specific sample counts make covariance-window reshaping fail. The pipeline crops one final sample and retries, up to this limit, recording the event in ASR diagnostics.
asr._doc_max_modification: QC threshold: blocks exceeding this modification rate are flagged for exclusion. Set to 65% to avoid false exclusions across different CPU architectures.

ica._doc_fit_params: Extended Infomax is kept explicit for auditability and reproducibility rather than relying on an implicit default.

autoreject._doc_cv: AutoReject cross-validation folds only. This repo uses the upstream library default of cv=10. This parameter does not affect ICLabel or ICA classification.

alpha_gamma_pac._doc: Secondary theoretically motivated H2 alpha-gamma PAC and its EMG sensitivity counterpart. Same MI/surrogate method and frontoparietal topology as theta-gamma PAC, with frontal alpha phase instead of frontal theta phase.
alpha_gamma_pac._doc_analysis_excluded_subjects: Study-specific QC-based H2 alpha-gamma PAC exclusions for the current dataset. For a new dataset, clear or replace these subject IDs after reviewing that dataset's QC outputs. Raw feature extraction can still compute all participants, but H2 inference and alpha-gamma EMG sensitivity outputs should drop listed subjects.

pac_phase_qc._doc: QC-only spectral support check for the frontal phase bands used in theta-gamma and alpha-gamma PAC. Uses cleaned PAC epochs, the PAC analysis window, and residual spectra after aperiodic removal.

psd._doc_nfft_factor: Zero-padding factor for Welch PSD interpolation in PAC phase QC. This improves visual/readout granularity only; true spectral resolution remains set by nperseg_seconds.

p3b_qc._doc: QC-only visual and numeric checks for the configured P3b ERP branch, ROI, and measurement window.
